name: charge_skill
description: Phase 3 skill: L = charge. Possessed champion presses L, dashes forward at 14 m/s for 0.4s with i-frames, hits enemies along path for 1.2× damage. Test: 1 raider south of champion (matches default facing), one charge press should kill it. Damage 18 × 1.2 = 22 vs 15 hp raider.
